title: The Small Flower Shop
content: Every Saturday, Ethan visited a small flower shop on the corner of the street. He always bought fresh flowers, even though he had no special reason. The owner noticed that he often talked with Mia, the young woman who worked there. Week after week, their conversations became longer. One morning, Mia handed Ethan a sunflower instead of letting him pay for it. She smiled and said, “This one is my gift.” Ethan left the shop carrying flowers and a heart full of hope.
